TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_temi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: um kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling ma qpatun gaga sapah laqi rseno nii taqianna.
S.PHON: um kiŋan laqi ɾseno daħaka ħuliŋ ma qpatun gaga sapaħ laqi ɾseno nii taqianna.
S.FORM: um kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling ma qpatun gaga sapah laqi rseno nii taqianna.
S.PHON: um kiŋan laqi ɾseno daħaka ħuliŋ ma qpatun gaga sapaħ laqi ɾseno nii taqianna.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩、一隻狗和一隻青蛙在房子裡.他們在這男孩的房間裡.
A boy, a dog, and a frog are in the house. They are in the boy's room

S.FORM: qitaanmu kingan idas keyimaML2?
S.PHON: qitaanmu kiŋan idas kejimaml*?
S.FORM: qitaanmu kingan idas keyimaML2?
S.PHON: qitaanmu kiŋan idas kejimaml*?
S.TRANSL: 我看到一個月亮.可以嗎?
I saw a moon. Is this Ok?

S.FORM: um gaga msuupu mita laqi rseno msuupu mita qpatun gaga rusuq ka huling.
S.PHON: um gaga msuupu mita laqi ɾseno msuupu mita qpatun gaga ɾusuq ka ħuliŋ.
S.FORM: um gaga msuupu mita laqi rseno msuupu mita qpatun gaga rusuq ka huling.
S.PHON: um gaga msuupu mita laqi ɾseno msuupu mita qpatun gaga ɾusuq ka ħuliŋ.
S.TRANSL: 男孩和狗一起看在瓶子裡的青蛙.
The boy and the dog were looking at the frog in the bottle together.

S.FORM: saya mprengoku kingan a oda nodaan na kari kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling.
S.PHON: saja mpɾeŋoku kiŋan a oda nodaan na kaɾi kiŋan laqi ɾseno daħaka ħuliŋ.
S.FORM: saya mprengoku kingan a oda nodaan na kari kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling.
S.PHON: saja mpɾeŋoku kiŋan a oda nodaan na kaɾi kiŋan laqi ɾseno daħaka ħuliŋ.
S.TRANSL: 現在呢,我要來說一個關於一個男孩和狗的故事.
Now, I'm going to tell a story about a boy and a dog.

S.FORM: huling dahaka laqi rseno nii ga mi gaga rusug truma hii ka qpatun.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii ga mi gaga ɾusug tɾuma ħii ka qpatun.
S.FORM: huling dahaka laqi rseno nii ga mi gaga rusug truma hii ka qpatun.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii ga mi gaga ɾusug tɾuma ħii ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 狗和這個小男孩在看在罐子裡的青蛙.
The dog and the dog are looking at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: kiya huling nii wa mpqerac heya.
S.PHON: kija ħuliŋ nii wa mpqeɾaʦ ħeja.
S.FORM: kiya huling nii wa mpqerac heya.
S.PHON: kija ħuliŋ nii wa mpqeɾaʦ ħeja.

TRANSL.notes: 那麼這隻狗呢,他就想去抓(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 那麼這隻狗呢,他就想去抓 .

TRANSL.notes: And this dog, it is trying to catch (the frog).

S.TRANSL: And this dog, it is trying to catch .

S.FORM: ma riso laqi mu rseno nii mqaras riyung mita mhulis uri.
S.PHON: ma ɾiso laqi mu ɾseno nii mqaɾas ɾijuŋ mita mħulis uɾi.
S.FORM: ma riso laqi mu rseno nii mqaras riyung mita mhulis uri.
S.PHON: ma ɾiso laqi mu ɾseno nii mqaɾas ɾijuŋ mita mħulis uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 這個小男孩看了很高興,也笑了.
And the boy was very happy, seeing this. He was laughing too.

S.FORM: tloong ga kacna ga qmita qpatun.
S.PHON: tlooŋ ga kaʦna ga qmita qpatun.
S.FORM: tloong ga kacna ga qmita qpatun.
S.PHON: tlooŋ ga kaʦna ga qmita qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他坐在他的椅子椅子上,看著青蛙.
Sitting on his chair, he was looking at the frog.

S.FORM: keeman de qitaanta sapahna eniqan a idas a.
S.PHON: keeman de qitaanta sapaħna eniqan a idas a.
S.FORM: keeman de qitaanta sapahna eniqan a idas a.
S.PHON: keeman de qitaanta sapaħna eniqan a idas a.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上,我們從房子看到月亮.
It was night now, and we could see the moon from the house.

S.FORM: bobo a qitaan kndalax baisna ka idas sapah truma nii sapahna laqi nii we sapah taqianna.
S.PHON: bobo a qitaan kndalax baisna ka idas sapaħ tɾuma nii sapaħna laqi nii we sapaħ taqianna.
S.FORM: bobo a qitaan kndalax baisna ka idas sapah truma nii sapahna laqi nii we sapah taqianna.
S.PHON: bobo a qitaan kndalax baisna ka idas sapaħ tɾuma nii sapaħna laqi nii we sapaħ taqianna.
S.TRANSL: 之後,這個小孩在房子裡,從房間的窗戶看到的月亮.
Afterwards, the kid saw the moon from the window of his house, from his room.

S.FORM: heya gaga taqi sapah a ga taqi qlapo.
S.PHON: ħeja gaga taqi sapaħ a ga taqi qlapo.
S.FORM: heya gaga taqi sapah a ga taqi qlapo.
S.PHON: ħeja gaga taqi sapaħ a ga taqi qlapo.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩在房裡的床上睡覺.
The boy was sleeping on the bed, in his house.

S.FORM: kignan hulingna ga suupu mtaqi heya ga mtaqi bobo palana uri laqi nii.
S.PHON: kignan ħuliŋna ga suupu mtaqi ħeja ga mtaqi bobo palana uɾi laqi nii.
S.FORM: kignan hulingna ga suupu mtaqi heya ga mtaqi bobo palana uri laqi nii.
S.PHON: kignan ħuliŋna ga suupu mtaqi ħeja ga mtaqi bobo palana uɾi laqi nii.

TRANSL.notes: 他的狗也跟他一起睡.他(狗)睡在小男孩的被子上.

S.TRANSL: 他的狗也跟他一起睡.他 睡在小男孩的被子上.

TRANSL.notes: His dog was sleeping with him. He (the dog) was sleeping on the boy's quilt.

S.TRANSL: His dog was sleeping with him. He was sleeping on the boy's quilt.

S.FORM: qpatun nii de anu ga mtaqi dheya huling dahaka riso nii qpatun do mkala kndalax rusuq meyah nganguc ka qpatun.
S.PHON: qpatun nii de anu ga mtaqi dħeja ħuliŋ daħaka ɾiso nii qpatun do mkala kndalax ɾusuq mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ ka qpatun.
S.FORM: qpatun nii de anu ga mtaqi dheya huling dahaka riso nii qpatun do mkala kndalax rusuq meyah nganguc ka qpatun.
S.PHON: qpatun nii de anu ga mtaqi dħeja ħuliŋ daħaka ɾiso nii qpatun do mkala kndalax ɾusuq mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 因為狗狗和小男孩在睡覺,這隻青蛙就從瓶子裡爬出來,而來到了外面.
Since they, the dog and the boy, were sleeping, the frog climbed out of the bottle, and came outside.

S.FORM: tutuy ka huling dahaka laqi rseno nii qitaandaha rusuq uka hii ka qpatun di wada qduriq di.
S.PHON: tutuj ka ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii qitaandaħa ɾusuq uka ħii ka qpatun di wada qduɾiq di.
S.FORM: tutuy ka huling dahaka laqi rseno nii qitaandaha rusuq uka hii ka qpatun di wada qduriq di.
S.PHON: tutuj ka ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii qitaandaħa ɾusuq uka ħii ka qpatun di wada qduɾiq di.
S.TRANSL: 狗狗和小男孩醒來後,他們便又看著瓶子.但是青蛙卻不在那裏.他已經逃走了.
The dog and the boy woke up. They looked at the bottle, and the frog wasn't there. He had escaped!

S.FORM: sklui mita huling dahaka laqi rseno nii wada qduriq ka qpatun.
S.PHON: sklui mita ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii wada qduɾiq ka qpatun.
S.FORM: sklui mita huling dahaka laqi rseno nii wada qduriq ka qpatun.
S.PHON: sklui mita ħuliŋ daħaka laqi ɾseno nii wada qduɾiq ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩和狗看到青蛙逃走了很驚訝.
The dog and the boy were surprised to find that the frog had escaped.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii wa mesa ka sklui skadiun dahaka qpatun nii.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii wa mesa ka sklui skadiun daħaka qpatun nii.
S.FORM: laqi rseno nii wa mesa ka sklui skadiun dahaka qpatun nii.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii wa mesa ka sklui skadiun daħaka qpatun nii.
S.TRANSL: 男孩於是「哇」的叫著.驚嚇之餘,他開始尋找青蛙.
The boy then cried out, "wa ...". He was surprised, and he stared to look for the frog.

S.FORM: kelaun gaga s so sapi n s wada tgleeng sapi sapina.
S.PHON: kelaun gaga s so sapi n s wada tgleeŋ sapi sapina.
S.FORM: kelaun gaga s so sapi n s wada tgleeng sapi sapina.
S.PHON: kelaun gaga s so sapi n s wada tgleeŋ sapi sapina.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙可能躲在他的鞋子裡.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps it (the frog) had gone hiding in his shoes!

S.TRANSL: Perhaps it had gone hiding in his shoes!

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii ma dooiunna baro ka sapina qitaanna kika uxe gaga truma sapina ka qpatun.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii ma dooiunna baɾo ka sapina qitaanna kika uxe gaga tɾuma sapina ka qpatun.
S.FORM: laqi rseno nii ma dooiunna baro ka sapina qitaanna kika uxe gaga truma sapina ka qpatun.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii ma dooiunna baɾo ka sapina qitaanna kika uxe gaga tɾuma sapina ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩於是拿起了他的鞋子並往裡看,但青蛙並不在裡面.
So the boy grabbed the top of his shoes and looked into them, but the frog is not in his shoes.

S.FORM: hulingna nii do skadi posaanna nduyungna truma ka rusuq ka tunuxna musa skadi qpatun uri ka huling nii.
S.PHON: ħuliŋna nii do skadi posaanna ndujuŋna tɾuma ka ɾusuq ka tunuxna musa skadi qpatun uɾi ka ħuliŋ nii.
S.FORM: hulingna nii do skadi posaanna nduyungna truma ka rusuq ka tunuxna musa skadi qpatun uri ka huling nii.
S.PHON: ħuliŋna nii do skadi posaanna ndujuŋna tɾuma ka ɾusuq ka tunuxna musa skadi qpatun uɾi ka ħuliŋ nii.
S.TRANSL: 而他的狗呢,也伸著脖子和頭到罐子裡去找青蛙.
And the boy's dog, he also put his neck and head into the bottle to look for the frog.

S.FORM: huling nii de ga tqecun a rusuq ka tunuxna ukana bale ngangalan ka so rusuq gaga pcequr nduyungna.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ nii de ga tqeʦun a ɾusuq ka tunuxna ukana bale ŋaŋalan ka so ɾusuq gaga pʦequɾ ndujuŋna.
S.FORM: huling nii de ga tqecun a rusuq ka tunuxna ukana bale ngangalan ka so rusuq gaga pcequr nduyungna.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ nii de ga tqeʦun a ɾusuq ka tunuxna ukana bale ŋaŋalan ka so ɾusuq gaga pʦequɾ ndujuŋna.
S.TRANSL: 狗的頭被卡在罐子裡,而且實在是拔不出來,因為他的脖子被卡住了.
The dog's head was stuck in the bottle, and he just couldn't get his head out of it, since his neck was stuck.

S.FORM: laqi rseno de raguhundaha bais raguhunna bais mlama mlawa qpatun.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno de ɾaguħundaħa bais ɾaguħunna bais mlama mlawa qpatun.
S.FORM: laqi rseno de raguhundaha bais raguhunna bais mlama mlawa qpatun.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno de ɾaguħundaħa bais ɾaguħunna bais mlama mlawa qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩打開窗戶不斷地呼喊著青蛙.
The boy opened the window and kept calling for the frog.

S.FORM: mlawa heya wadasu inu di ye mesa peni.
S.PHON: mlawa ħeja wadasu inu di je mesa peni.
S.FORM: mlawa heya wadasu inu di ye mesa peni.
S.PHON: mlawa ħeja wadasu inu di je mesa peni.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩呼喊著青蛙「你去哪裡了?」他是這麼說的吧.
He was calling. "Where did you go?" he probably said this

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii so sklui mita ka doriqna.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii so sklui mita ka doɾiqna.
S.FORM: laqi rseno nii so sklui mita ka doriqna.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii so sklui mita ka doɾiqna.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩的眼神好像是驚慌到了.
The boy's look seems to show that he was panicing.

S.FORM: malux sklui wada tuting ba uh bobo bais ka hulingna dahaka rusuq wada suupu mtakun bubu bobo bais.
S.PHON: malux sklui wada tutiŋ ba uħ bobo bais ka ħuliŋna daħaka ɾusuq wada suupu mtakun bubu bobo bais.
S.FORM: malux sklui wada tuting ba uh bobo bais ka hulingna dahaka rusuq wada suupu mtakun bubu bobo bais.
S.PHON: malux sklui wada tutiŋ ba uħ bobo bais ka ħuliŋna daħaka ɾusuq wada suupu mtakun bubu bobo bais.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼驚嚇呢? 因為他的狗和瓶子一起掉落到了窗戶上.
Why did he panic? Because both his dog and the bottle fell onto the window.

S.FORM: kiya sklui laqi nii ayu bale mesa.
S.PHON: kija sklui laqi nii aju bale mesa.
S.FORM: kiya sklui laqi nii ayu bale mesa.
S.PHON: kija sklui laqi nii aju bale mesa.
S.TRANSL: 所以小男孩驚嚇到了.「唉呀!」他叫出聲來.
So the boy was shocked. "Ayu!" he cried.

S.FORM: kiya ka meyah nganguc ka riso nii duri laqi rseno nii knkucu sapina kiya ka meyah nganguc xxxxx dooiunna ka hulingna daha dheya mqmalu riyung.
S.PHON: kija ka mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ ka ɾiso nii duɾi laqi ɾseno nii knkuʦu sapina kija ka mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ xxxxx dooiunna ka ħuliŋna daħa dħeja mqmalu ɾijuŋ.
S.FORM: kiya ka meyah nganguc ka riso nii duri laqi rseno nii knkucu sapina kiya ka meyah nganguc xxxxx dooiunna ka hulingna daha dheya mqmalu riyung.
S.PHON: kija ka mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ ka ɾiso nii duɾi laqi ɾseno nii knkuʦu sapina kija ka mejaħ ŋaŋuʦ xxxxx dooiunna ka ħuliŋna daħa dħeja mqmalu ɾijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以,小孩就穿鞋到外面去.他抱起狗並且安撫他.他們非常要好.
So the boy put on his shoes and came outside. He hugged the dog and comforted him. They are very close to each other.

S.FORM: huling nii mhuwesu bale me eh mesa ka lngelunganna cehakanna hema ka dqera na laqi nii.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ nii mħuwesu bale me eħ mesa ka lŋeluŋanna ʦeħakanna ħema ka dqeɾa na laqi nii.
S.FORM: huling nii mhuwesu bale me eh mesa ka lngelunganna cehakanna hema ka dqera na laqi nii.
S.PHON: ħuliŋ nii mħuwesu bale me eħ mesa ka lŋeluŋanna ʦeħakanna ħema ka dqeɾa na laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗想著:「真感謝你.」於是他便用舌頭舔這個小孩.
The dog thought: "Thank you very much!" licking the boy's cheek with his teeth.

S.FORM: kiya de dheya ga musa nganguc musa ngerac ga mlawa so qpatun kii peni.
S.PHON: kija de dħeja ga musa ŋaŋuʦ musa ŋeɾaʦ ga mlawa so qpatun kii peni.
S.FORM: kiya de dheya ga musa nganguc musa ngerac ga mlawa so qpatun kii peni.
S.PHON: kija de dħeja ga musa ŋaŋuʦ musa ŋeɾaʦ ga mlawa so qpatun kii peni.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們到外面去呼喊青蛙.
Then they go outside to call for the frog.

S.FORM: eniqan qhuni paru siyo sapahna.
S.PHON: eniqan qħuni paɾu sijo sapaħna.
S.FORM: eniqan qhuni paru siyo sapahna.
S.PHON: eniqan qħuni paɾu sijo sapaħna.
S.TRANSL: 他的房子旁邊有棵大樹.
There is a big tree next to his house.

S.FORM: heya do mlawa paru mlawa so qpatun ka hulingna uri heya uri laqi biciq nii.
S.PHON: ħeja do mlawa paɾu mlawa so qpatun ka ħuliŋna uɾi ħeja uɾi laqi biʦiq nii.
S.FORM: heya do mlawa paru mlawa so qpatun ka hulingna uri heya uri laqi biciq nii.
S.PHON: ħeja do mlawa paɾu mlawa so qpatun ka ħuliŋna uɾi ħeja uɾi laqi biʦiq nii.
S.TRANSL: 男孩大聲地叫喊青蛙,而狗也是.
The boy calls for the frog loudly, and so does the dog.

S.FORM: kiya theya hari nodaandaha mkesa meyah kingan pusu qhuni.
S.PHON: kija tħeja ħaɾi nodaandaħa mkesa mejaħ kiŋan pusu qħuni.
S.FORM: kiya theya hari nodaandaha mkesa meyah kingan pusu qhuni.
S.PHON: kija tħeja ħaɾi nodaandaħa mkesa mejaħ kiŋan pusu qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們走遠一點,來到了樹下.
Then they walked a little farther, and arrived at the bottom of a tree.

S.FORM: qitaandaha kingan a cudu a walu cudu walu a eniqan a walu truma hiya.
S.PHON: qitaandaħa kiŋan a ʦudu a walu ʦudu walu a eniqan a walu tɾuma ħija.
S.FORM: qitaandaha kingan a cudu a walu cudu walu a eniqan a walu truma hiya.
S.PHON: qitaandaħa kiŋan a ʦudu a walu ʦudu walu a eniqan a walu tɾuma ħija.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見一個蜂窩,裡面有蜜蜂.
They saw a bee hive, and there were bees inside.

S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan beling uri kingan pusu qhuni eniqan beling uri qhuni paru.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kiŋan beliŋ uɾi kiŋan pusu qħuni eniqan beliŋ uɾi qħuni paɾu.
S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan beling uri kingan pusu qhuni eniqan beling uri qhuni paru.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kiŋan beliŋ uɾi kiŋan pusu qħuni eniqan beliŋ uɾi qħuni paɾu.
S.TRANSL: 大樹的根部也有一個洞.
There was also a hole in the root of the big tree.

S.FORM: kiya ka meyah dehuk a toma ga eniqan cudu walu dheya daha nii.
S.PHON: kija ka mejaħ deħuk a toma ga eniqan ʦudu walu dħeja daħa nii.
S.FORM: kiya ka meyah dehuk a toma ga eniqan cudu walu dheya daha nii.
S.PHON: kija ka mejaħ deħuk a toma ga eniqan ʦudu walu dħeja daħa nii.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們來到了那棵有蜂窩的樹下面.
Then they both arrived at the root of the tree where there was a bee hive.

S.FORM: hulingna do mleus mleus a a so a so mkmangan so a cudu walu peni.
S.PHON: ħuliŋna do mleus mleus a a so a so mkmaŋan so a ʦudu walu peni.
S.FORM: hulingna do mleus mleus a a so a so mkmangan so a cudu walu peni.
S.PHON: ħuliŋna do mleus mleus a a so a so mkmaŋan so a ʦudu walu peni.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗瘋狂地吠著,他可能是想要把蜂窩拿起來吧.
The dog barked furiously. He probably wanted to take the bee hive.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii ge mita kingan a tgakac mita kingan a beling dheran.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii ge mita kiŋan a tgakaʦ mita kiŋan a beliŋ dħeɾan.
S.FORM: laqi rseno nii ge mita kingan a tgakac mita kingan a beling dheran.
S.PHON: laqi ɾseno nii ge mita kiŋan a tgakaʦ mita kiŋan a beliŋ dħeɾan.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩蹲下來往地洞裡看.
The boy knelt down and looked into the hole on the ground.

S.FORM: heya mita kingan beling dheran sklui asi tkriyak kndalax beling dheran hiya ka kingan qolic qolic yqeyaq.
